economic_notes: First Nation owns 100% of Fort William First Nation Holdings LP, which holds a 25% interest in Lot 251-3 Development LP. Anemki Mountain Business Trust is a Government Business Enterprise recorded using modified equity method. Multiple claim settlement trusts including Boundary Claim, Specific Claim Housing Trust, and Grand Trunk Pacific Railway Claim. Disputed municipal property taxes of $9,597,119 owing to City of Thunder Bay on approximately 1,100 acres of returned land since 1999.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) incomplete tangible capital asset inventory - First Nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150 TCA requirements; (2) property tax liabilities of $9,597,119 disputing City of Thunder Bay taxes on ~1,100 acres returned in 1999 are excluded from financial statements - had they been recorded, surplus would decrease by $1,072,170, accounts payable would increase by $9,597,119, and accumulated surplus would decrease by $18,358,797. No budget information disclosed. Financial statements signed November 24, 2023 for year ended March 31, 2022. Community and youth trust accounts of $107,785,447 included as non-financial assets representing significant trust holdings. Restricted cash includes Boundary Claim interest ($18,223,376) and GTP funds ($16,413,519).
